vocab.meaning: một bữa tiệc thị giác (thứ gì đó cực kỳ đẹp)
vocab.example: The rolling hills of the countryside are a feast for the eyes, especially when the morning mist is still hanging low.

vocab.meaning: ghi lại/lột tả được linh hồn, bản chất của thứ gì đó
vocab.example: I don't just snap photos; I try to capture the essence of the place so I can relive the feeling later.

vocab.meaning: ở trạng thái rực rỡ nhất, đẹp đẽ nhất
vocab.example: I waited for hours just to photograph the cathedral in its full glory as the sun began to set.

vocab.meaning: để lại ấn tượng sâu sắc, khó quên
vocab.example: That jagged coastline left a lasting impression on me, which is why it's my favorite landscape shot.

vocab.meaning: nơi hẻo lánh, xa xôi hẻo lánh
vocab.example: I love trekking into the middle of nowhere to find landscapes that haven't been touched by urbanization.
It was truly humbling to behold the sight of the Himalayas through my viewfinder.

vocab.meaning: vào lúc tảng sáng, bình minh sớm
vocab.example: I often drag myself out of bed at the crack of dawn to get that perfect, soft light for my nature photography.

vocab.meaning: tuyệt vời, không thực (như ở thế giới khác)
vocab.example: The rock formations in that national park were absolutely out of this world; they looked like a movie set.

vocab.meaning: đắm chìm vào, quên hết mọi thứ xung quanh vì cái gì
vocab.example: It's easy to lose oneself in the vastness of the desert while trying to find the perfect angle for a photo.
Taking a picture makes me feel like that beautiful view is frozen in time forever, regardless of how the world changes.
